title: Automation - New Task auto-assignment notification
excerpt:

posts.author: SuperKatzanova (Ryan Katz)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a board with the automation when a user creates a task it assigns the task to me. Some of them add these assignments in bulk and I’m notified via email, application, etc. For every task.

Is there a way to turn the notification off?

posts.author: lauralev (Laura Levy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Ryan!

Great question, you’re able to tweak your email notifications but not bell at the moment. To do that you’ll go to your avatar > my profile > notifications. Then uncheck “when an item is assigned to me” and any others that you wouldn’t want to receive email notifications for. Cheers!

posts.author: SuperKatzanova (Ryan Katz)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for the feedback! Would it be possible customize the notifications for specific boards?
